truth:
Initial files present before the agent starts:

1. /home/user/data/training_samples.json  
--------------------------------------------------
[
  {"id":"001","features":[0.1,0.5,0.2],"label":"positive"},
  {"id":"002","features":[0.3,0.6],"label":"negative"},
  {"id":"003","features":[0.4,0.2,0.1],"label":"neutral"},
  {"id":"004","features":[0.8,0.9,0.7],"label":"negative"},
  {"id":"005","id_extra":"something","features":[0.2,0.4,0.5],"label":"positive"}
]
--------------------------------------------------

2. /home/user/data/feature_schema.json  
(the informal schema — NOT required for the task but present for realism)
--------------------------------------------------
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["id", "features", "label"],
  "properties": {
    "id":  { "type": "string" },
    "features": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": { "type": "number" },
      "minItems": 3,
      "maxItems": 3
    },
    "label": {
      "type": "string",
      "enum": ["positive", "negative"]
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
--------------------------------------------------

Directories already created with correct write permissions:

/home/user/data  
/home/user/output   (empty)

Expected final artefacts after correct task execution:

A. /home/user/output/valid_samples.json  
(single-line, compact JSON array)
--------------------------------------------------
[{"id":"001","features":[0.1,0.5,0.2],"label":"positive"},{"id":"004","features":[0.8,0.9,0.7],"label":"negative"},{"id":"005","id_extra":"something","features":[0.2,0.4,0.5],"label":"positive"}]
--------------------------------------------------
